log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 15 (d20:15 + 0)
Vedalken — Bardic Musician: 7 (d20:5 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 53/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 40/67
⚡ Vedalken — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:5 total 15 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Vedalken — Bardic Musician casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Vedalken — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Vedalken — Bardic Musician for 7. HP: 47/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Vedalken — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS!
→ Half damage: 3
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 36/67
→ Concentration save: [20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 22/67
→ Concentration save: [14 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 10/67
→ Vedalken — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
⚡ Vedalken — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:8 total 18 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Vedalken — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Vedalken — Bardic Musician casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Vedalken — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
